prompt: a microscopic image of the region inside the rectangle in the reference image, as if it's being viewed under a microscope.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic, highly magnified microscopic view of the specific region on the dragonfly's upper right wing, precisely as indicated by the red rectangle in image 1. objects: Section of dragonfly's upper right wing (corresponding to the red rectangle)
Dark brown pigmented area on the wing section
